title: Udon Prison Breaks Under Luffy’s Will
description: On pages 17–20, this part focuses on Unknown person #13, Unknown person #14, Zoro, Unknown person #15, Unknown person #16 as Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
scene: Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I was no match for him...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: I never thought that I'd lose...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: So this is the power... of the world's strongest...!!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This is the power of the grand line... no of the world...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Even pirate Hunter zero was no match for him...!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: From the moment I decided to become the strongest swordsman in the world.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: That damn bastard is insane!! Your opponent is the world s strongest, in the flesh!! If it'll cost you your life...then just throw away, your ambition!!!

summary: This section advances the Wano - Udon Liberation storyline with 21 dialogue beats. Luffy turns Udon prison into the rebellion’s first major victory while Big Mom and Queen throw the prison into chaos.
